title: Ammit SMP
description: This is a modpack for the Ammit creators.
body: ![Ammit Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96b8aa5a745b09544afa4a798830d7292928266b.png) ## Installation Requirements This version of Ammit runs on [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) only. ## About Welcome to Ammit SMP, a modpack of variety of tools and blocks for Building, Decoration, Terrain Generation, Optimization and Content Creation. This modpack is meant to be played with friends! ## ![Ammit Socials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd860c5e8265802aab9c6b6b2e9be84e1fae3bfa.png) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@AmmitSMP) - [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@ammitsmp) ## Credits‎ ‎ ‎ ### Modpack Team [Gavhin](https://www.youtube.com/@Gavhin), [Goatted](https://www.youtube.com/@goatted) ##
